title: anthyllis vulneraria f. hirsutissima
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria f. hirsutissima, also known as hairy kidney vetch, is a flowering plant of the Fabaceae family, specifically a subspecies of the kidney vetch. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and vulnerary (wound-healing) effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as skin problems, wounds, and respiratory conditions, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and saponins. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of certain health conditions.
